name: spl-bridge default tool catalogue
description: Default MCP tool collection. Each entry wraps a publicly documented Splunk REST endpoint (https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/RESTREF/RESTprolog) with a thin SPL `| rest` invocation and a deterministic `| fields` projection. See data/PROVENANCE.md for per-tool source-of-record citations.
_provenance: Independently authored against the public Splunk REST API Reference. Not derived from the CiscoDevNet/Splunk-MCP-Server-official source or the Splunkbase Splunk MCP Server app.

tools.name: get_info
tools.title: get_info
tools.description: Return version, build, hardware, and licensing information for the connected Splunk instance.

execution.template: | rest /services/server/info | fields version, build, serverName, os_name, cpu_arch, numberOfCores, physicalMemoryMB, licenseState, kvStoreStatus, server_roles, health_info

tools.name: get_indexes
tools.title: get_indexes
tools.description: List indexes on the connected Splunk instance with size and event-count summaries.

execution.template: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | fields title, disabled, currentDBSizeMB, totalEventCount, splunk_server

tools.name: get_index_info
tools.title: get_index_info
tools.description: Return detailed configuration and storage state for a single named index.

index_name.description: Name of the index to describe.
index_name.validation_message: Index name may only contain alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

execution.template: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=$index_name$ | fields title, disabled, currentDBSizeMB, totalEventCount, homePath, coldPath, thawedPath, maxDataSize, maxHotBuckets, maxWarmDBCount, datatype, frozenTimePeriodInSecs, maxTotalDataSizeMB, bucketRebuildMemoryHint, splunk_server

tools.name: get_user_list
tools.title: get_user_list
tools.description: List Splunk users together with their roles, default app, and last-login timestamp.

execution.template: | rest splunk_server=local /services/authentication/users count=0 | rename title AS username | eval capabilities_count=mvcount(capabilities) | fields username, realname, email, roles, defaultApp, capabilities_count, last_successful_login, type

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.title: get_user_info
tools.description: Return profile information about the currently authenticated Splunk principal.

execution.template: | rest splunk_server=local /services/authentication/current-context | eval capabilities_count=mvcount(capabilities) | fields username, realname, email, roles, defaultApp, capabilities_count, last_successful_login, type

tools.name: run_query
tools.title: run_query
tools.description: Execute an ad-hoc SPL search supplied by the caller. The SPL is validated against the project's command allowlist (data/safe_spl.json) before dispatch.

query.description: SPL search to execute. Maximum 5000 characters.
query.validation_message: SPL query is required and limited to 5000 characters.

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.title: get_metadata
tools.description: Return host, source, or sourcetype metadata for one or more indexes within the requested time window.

type.description: Metadata category to enumerate (hosts, sources, or sourcetypes).

index.description: Index name or wildcard pattern (e.g. main, app_*, *).
index.validation_message: Index pattern may only contain letters, numbers, underscore, dash, and the * wildcard.

execution.template: | metadata type=$type$ index=$index$ | fields firstTime, lastTime, recentTime, host, source, sourcetype, totalCount, type

tools.name: get_kv_store_collections
tools.title: get_kv_store_collections
tools.description: Return raw KV Store collection statistics (storage size in bytes, document count) for each collection. Callers are expected to format units client-side.

execution.template: | rest /services/server/introspection/kvstore/collectionstats | mvexpand data | spath input=data | rex field=ns "^[^.]+\.(?<collection>.+)$" | eval storage_bytes=coalesce(storageSize, size+totalIndexSize) | table collection, storage_bytes, count, size, totalIndexSize | sort collection

tools.name: get_knowledge_objects
tools.title: get_knowledge_objects
tools.description: List Splunk knowledge objects of a given type (saved searches, alerts, field extractions, aliases, calculated fields, lookups, automatic lookups, lookup transforms, macros, tags, data models, workflow actions, views, panels, or installed apps).

_type_spl_map.saved_searches: | rest /servicesNS/-/-/saved/searches count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, search, cron_schedule, disabled, dispatch.earliest_time, dispatch.latest_time
_type_spl_map.alerts: | rest /servicesNS/-/-/saved/searches count=0 | search alert_type!="" alert_type!="always" | rename title AS name | fields name, search, alert_type, actions, cron_schedule, disabled
_type_spl_map.field_extractions: | rest /services/data/props/extractions count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, type, attribute, stanza, disabled, owner, sharing, app
_type_spl_map.field_aliases: | rest /services/data/props/fieldaliases count=0 | rename title AS name, stanza AS source_key | fields name, source_key, alias_fields
_type_spl_map.calculated_fields: | rest /services/data/props/calcfields count=0 | rename title AS name, stanza AS sourcetype, eval AS eval_expression | fields name, sourcetype, eval_expression, field_name
_type_spl_map.lookups: | rest /services/data/lookup-table-files count=0 | rename title AS name, eai:appName AS app | fields name, app, filename
_type_spl_map.automatic_lookups: | rest /services/data/props/lookups count=0 | rename title AS name, stanza AS sourcetype | fields name, sourcetype, lookup_table, fields_list
_type_spl_map.lookup_transforms: | rest /services/data/transforms/lookups count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, external_type, filename, fields_list
_type_spl_map.macros: | rest /services/data/macros count=0 | rename title AS name, args AS arguments | fields name, definition, arguments
_type_spl_map.tags: | rest /services/search/tags count=0 | rename title AS tag_name | fields tag_name, canonical_name, tag_name_aliases
_type_spl_map.data_models: | rest /services/datamodel/model count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, eai:acl.app, eai:acl.owner, eai:acl.sharing, acceleration, disabled
_type_spl_map.workflow_actions: | rest /services/data/ui/workflow-actions count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, label, uri, fields, type
_type_spl_map.views: | rest /services/data/ui/views count=0 | rename title AS name, isDashboard AS is_dashboard | fields name, label, is_dashboard
_type_spl_map.panels: | rest /services/data/ui/panels count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, eai:acl.app, eai:acl.owner, eai:acl.sharing, definition
_type_spl_map.apps: | rest splunk_server=local /services/apps/local count=0 | rename title AS name | fields name, version, author, description, disabled, visible

tools.name: run_saved_search
tools.title: run_saved_search
tools.description: Execute a Splunk saved search by name. Use get_knowledge_objects with type='saved_searches' to discover available saved searches. If the saved search name exists in multiple apps, the alphabetically first app is used unless 'app' is specified.

saved_search_name.description: Name of the saved search to execute.
saved_search_name.validation_message: Saved search name is required, cannot be blank, and is limited to 500 characters.

args.description: Optional replacement arguments for saved-search tokens, as space-separated key="value" pairs.
args.validation_message: args must be space-separated key="value" token assignments only.

earliest_time.description: Override the saved search's default earliest time (e.g., -24h, -7d).

latest_time.description: Override the saved search's default latest time (e.g., now, -1h).

app.description: Splunk app context to dispatch the saved search in.
app.validation_message: App name may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and dots.
